title: Best Fight
wikitext:
[]: Best Fight             Quote Post by RandomStuff » Sat Mar 15, 2008 7:03 pm What do you think was the greatest battle in Eva? I vote: Operation Yashima The 6th angel[The one where Shinji and Asuka have to do the dancing] 02 vs. The Harpies-Pure greatness

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Mar 15, 2008 7:12 pm Not the sixth Angel, it was the seventh, Israfel. The sixth is Gaghiel, the aquatic Angel.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 15, 2008 9:15 pm Toji beating up Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by zimlord » Sat Mar 15, 2008 9:18 pm naoko-sempai vs. the floor i lost money on that one...

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Mar 15, 2008 10:24 pm Shinji versus bandaged and bleeding Rei.

[]: Re: Best Fight             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 15, 2008 10:56 pm RandomStuff wrote: 02 vs. The Harpies-Pure greatness

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Mar 15, 2008 11:27 pm zimlord wrote: naoko-sempai vs. the floor i lost money on that one...

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun Mar 16, 2008 12:38 am zeruel no question.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Mar 16, 2008 12:55 am Slothen and Reichu:

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 16, 2008 1:13 am Your emoticon perplexes me.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun Mar 16, 2008 2:22 am what the fuck.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Mar 16, 2008 2:42 am Reichu wrote: Your emoticon perplexes me.

[]:             Quote Post by Furu » Sun Mar 16, 2008 4:36 am Ignoring that absolutely terrifying post a ways up for sanity's sake... I'm going to say Israfel or Zeruel. Israfel was just plain fun and Zeruel was...well, the most dramatic fight in the TV series (aside from Kaworu but let's face it, bursting through the wall gets you massive cool points).

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Mar 16, 2008 4:46 am This thread is fucked up EVA-02 vs Harpies One of my all-time favourite action scenes and only mecha action scene on that list (that is) Of course, numbers 2 & 3 respectively are: Ep19 *hurr hurr munch munch* Ep18 Actually those two belongs on my all time favourite list too Though I have to say that RoE Operation Yashima thriumphs them all

[]:             Quote Post by Furu » Sun Mar 16, 2008 4:59 am Xard wrote: Though I have to say that RoE Operation Yashima thriumphs them all

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Sun Mar 16, 2008 6:36 am Maya vs her lunch.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sun Mar 16, 2008 11:17 am Everyone's fight vs. Sanity. Poor sanity didn't stand a chance. It was a blood bath.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun Mar 16, 2008 12:36 pm the one vs Israfel is a fun one to watch. I personally like the episode with ireul.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Mar 16, 2008 12:44 pm The pre-Instrumentality fight between Shinji and Asuka was the best. Mostly because it reminds me of crazy ex-girlfriends. And no, I didn't strangle any of them, although I might have wanted to.

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Sun Mar 16, 2008 2:08 pm Shinji popping off kawrous head was win for me.
summary:
[]: Best Fight             Quote Post by RandomStuff » Sat Mar 15, 2008 7:03 pm What do you think was the greatest battle in Eva? I vote: Operation Yashima The 6th angel[The one where Shinji and Asuka have to do the dancing] 02 vs. The Harpies-Pure greatness

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Mar 15, 2008 7:12 pm Not the sixth Angel, it was the seventh, Israfel. The sixth
